Bash(/Users/rexraphael/Work/xraph/forgery/authsome/test_appid_test.go << 'GOTEST'
package authsome_test

import \(
	"fmt"
	"testing"
	"github.com/xraph/authsome/id"
\)

func TestAppIDPrefix\(t *testing.T\) {
	var aid id.AppID
	fmt.Printf\("Zero AppID Prefix: %q\\n", aid.Prefix\(\)\)
	fmt.Printf\("Zero AppID String: %q\\n", aid.String\(\)\)

	parsed, _ := id.ParseAppID\("aapp_01jf0000000000000000000000"\)
	fmt.Printf\("Parsed AppID Prefix: %q\\n", parsed.Prefix\(\)\)
	fmt.Printf\("Parsed AppID String: %q\\n", parsed.String\(\)\)
}
GOTEST)

Bash(/tmp/jsonb_fix_test.go << 'GOEOF'
//go:build integration

package bun_test

import \(
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"testing"
	"time"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
	"github.com/uptrace/bun"

	"github.com/xraph/authsome/id"
\)

type TestAppModel struct {
	bun.BaseModel `bun:"table:authsome_apps,alias:a"`

	ID       string          `bun:"id,pk"`
	Name     string          `bun:"name,notnull"`
	Slug     string          `bun:"slug,notnull"`
	Logo     string          `bun:"logo"`
	Metadata json.RawMessage `bun:"metadata,type:jsonb"`
	CreatedAt time.Time      `bun:"created_at,notnull,default:now\(\)"`
	UpdatedAt time.Time      `bun:"updated_at,notnull,default:now\(\)"`
}

func TestDebugMetadataRawMessage\(t *testing.T\) {
	s := setupTestStore\(t\)
	ctx := context.Background\(\)

	appID := id.NewAppID\(\)
	md, _ := json.Marshal\(map[string]string{"plan": "pro"}\)

	m := &TestAppModel{
		ID:        appID.String\(\),
		Name:      "Raw App",
		Slug:      "raw-app",
		Metadata:  json.RawMessage\(md\),
		CreatedAt: time.Now\(\),
		UpdatedAt: time.Now\(\),
	}
	_, err := s.DB\(\).NewInsert\(\).Model\(m\).Exec\(ctx\)
	require.NoError\(t, err\)

	got := new\(TestAppModel\)
	err = s.DB\(\).NewSelect\(\).Model\(got\).Where\("id = ?", appID.String\(\)\).Scan\(ctx\)
	require.NoError\(t, err\)
	t.Logf\("metadata \(json.RawMessage\): %s", got.Metadata\)

	var parsed map[string]string
	require.NoError\(t, json.Unmarshal\(got.Metadata, &parsed\)\)
	t.Logf\("parsed: %v", parsed\)
	require.Equal\(t, "pro", parsed["plan"]\)
}
GOEOF)

Bash(/tmp/typeid_test.go << 'EOF'
package main

import \(
	"fmt"
	"go.jetify.com/typeid/v2"
\)

func main\(\) {
	var zero typeid.TypeID
	s := zero.String\(\)
	fmt.Printf\("zero TypeID String\(\) = %q \(len=%d\)\\n", s, len\(s\)\)
	fmt.Printf\("zero TypeID Prefix\(\) = %q\\n", zero.Prefix\(\)\)
}
EOF)
